hero.headline: We lay, fabricate, and restore stone, marble, and floors.
hero.intro: A specialist flooring and natural-stone workshop. From raw slab to a flawless, finished surface — built to last in {area}.

disciplines.label: What we do
disciplines.title: One workshop for floors and stone alike.

d1.title: Stone & Marble Flooring
d1.body: Carrara, Calacatta, basalt, and travertine floors — cut, set, and finished by hand.

d2.title: Granite & Surfaces
d2.body: Countertops, vanities, and feature walls fabricated and installed to the millimetre.

d3.title: Hardwood & Tile
d3.body: Wide-plank, herringbone, and large-format tile for floors and wet areas.

d4.title: Restoration & Polishing
d4.body: Grinding, honing, polishing, and sealing — bringing dull stone back to life.

cta.label: Start a project
cta.title: Let’s talk about your floors and stone.

work.label: Selected work
work.h1: Before & after. Raw slab to finished surface.
work.intro: Drag any divider to reveal the difference. Every project is real work for real homeowners.

contact.label: Contact
contact.intro: Tell us about your space — square footage, materials, timeline — and we’ll respond within one business day.

form.name: Name
form.detailsPh: Tell us about your space, materials, and timeline…

success.label: Sent

success.body: We’ll be in touch within one business day.

error.title: This page wandered off.
error.body: Let’s get you back on solid ground.

calacatta-bath.title: Calacatta Master Bath
calacatta-bath.summary: Large-format Calacatta cut, honed, and polished — from raw slab to a seamless, book-matched surface.

carrara-floor.title: Carrara Entry Floor
carrara-floor.summary: A worn entry floor relaid in Carrara and machine-polished to an even, mirror-clean finish.

nero-feature.title: Nero Marquina Feature Wall
nero-feature.summary: Dramatic black marble with white veining, fabricated and set as a floor-to-ceiling statement.

graphite-counter.title: Graphite Granite Kitchen
graphite-counter.summary: Etched, dull granite restored through professional grinding, polishing, and sealing.

travertine-patio.title: Travertine Courtyard
travertine-patio.summary: Cracked concrete resurfaced with tumbled travertine for a warm, weather-ready floor.

basalt-floor.title: Basalt Gallery Floor
basalt-floor.summary: Raw basalt slabs honed to a soft, uniform matte — a calm, architectural floor.

t1.quote: They transformed our worn-out living room into something out of a magazine. The white oak floors are flawless and the crew was meticulous start to finish.

t2.quote: The marble work in our master bath is stunning. They helped us pick the slab, handled everything, and left the site spotless every single day.

t3.quote: Honest pricing, no surprises, and the slate entry looks better than we imagined. We’ve already booked them for the patio.

t4.quote: Our old granite counters looked dead. After their restoration they shine like new — saved us thousands versus replacement.

t5.quote: Craftsmanship you rarely see anymore. The herringbone floor in our kitchen is a showpiece and everyone asks who did it.

t6.quote: Professional, punctual, and genuinely skilled with natural stone. Communication was excellent throughout the project.

home.title: {name} — Flooring, Marble & Natural Stone
home.description: {name} designs and installs premium flooring, natural stone, and surface finishes — hardwood, tile, marble, and custom stonework built to last.

work.title: Work — Before & After Stone Transformations
work.description: Real before-and-after stonework: Carrara, Calacatta, Nero marble, granite, travertine, and floor restoration by {name}.

reviews.title: Reviews — What Our Clients Say
reviews.description: Read client reviews. {name} averages {avg}★ for flooring, marble, and natural-stone work.

contact.title: Contact — Get a Free Flooring & Stone Quote
contact.description: Request a free, no-obligation quote from {name}. Call {phone} or send your project details.
